task_completion.description: Add a ground station for Cherry Springs State Park with correct coordinates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A ground station configuration window or list in GPredict showing 'Cherry Springs State Park' with Latitude 41.6628 (or 41°39'46" N), Longitude -77.8239 (or 77°49'26" W), and Altitude 700m.

task_completion.description: Configure GPredict to display all timestamps in UTC.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The GPredict Preferences window showing the time format set to UTC, or the main application clock/status bar explicitly displaying 'UTC' instead of local time.

task_completion.description: Create a new module named 'BrightSats' tracking specific space stations.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A module tab or window named 'BrightSats' that includes ISS (ZARYA), CSS (TIANHE), and ISS (NAUKA) in its satellite list or views.

task_completion.description: Configure the 'BrightSats' module layout to show Map and Polar views.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'BrightSats' module visually displays exactly two view panes: a Map view and a Polar (radar) view.

task_completion.description: Reconfigure the 'Amateur' module layout to show Map, List, and Polar views.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Amateur' module visually displays exactly three view panes: a Map view, a List view, and a Polar (radar) view, while still showing a populated list of amateur satellites.

integrity.description: The agent used the GPredict GUI to configure the settings rather than modifying configuration files via terminal.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with GPredict dialog boxes (Preferences, Module configuration, Edit Ground Stations) rather than terminal windows editing .cfg or .mod files.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual GPredict application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The application window matches the standard GPredict interface, not a text editor, mock-up, or script output.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the GUI by manually writing GRID strings to configuration files.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of terminal windows open to ~/.config/Gpredict/ editing layout strings directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Satellites required in BrightSats: ISS (ZARYA) [NORAD 25544], CSS (TIANHE) [NORAD 48274], and ISS (NAUKA) [NORAD 49044]. BrightSats must show exactly 2 views: Map and Polar. Amateur module must show exactly 3 views: Map, List, and Polar. Cherry Springs State Park coordinates: 41.6628 N, 77.8239 W, Altitude 700m. Time must be set to UTC (visually verifiable in Preferences or main clock). Note: Programmatic evaluation for this task is defective due to obsolete config keys, so rely strictly on visual confirmation of the GPredict GUI.
